read_only: Read,Glob,Grep,Bash(git status *),Bash(git branch *),Bash(git log *),Bash(git show *),Bash(git diff *),Bash(rg *),Bash(Get-Content *)

claude.notes: Use the .cmd shim on Windows. The cheap tier is explicit Haiku/low effort; Haiku 4.5 is Anthropic's current cost-efficient model. Read-only mode disables Edit/Write and allows only focused inspection commands.

codex.unavailable_reason: Installed CLI v0.135.0 cannot run the configured gpt-5.6-sol model and rejects the configured max reasoning value. Upgrade/reconcile the CLI before re-enabling this worker.
codex.notes: Temporarily disabled after the 2026-07-10 live dispatch health check. Desktop Codex is unaffected.

hermes.notes: Hermes may use configured providers; verify cost/provider settings before long loops.

cursor.notes: Cursor is kept as a manual IDE lane because the installed CLI is not a clean stdout worker by default.

antigravity.notes: Use manually for IDE/visual work unless a reliable headless CLI is configured later.
